name: Chiara Neirick

find.name: Arely

find.name: cooper queen

find.match_belief: Slash until removing one more thing breaks it. That's the line.

profile.belief: The best spaces don't forgive sloppiness. They refuse to.
profile.working_on: Converting a condemned laundromat's violent decay into a gallery where broken walls argue back to every design choice.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to transform neglect into dialogue, seeking to honor the raw beauty of imperfection through intentional design.
